children.heading: Federal and State antidiscrimination laws
children.label: a Federal and State antidiscrimination laws
children.text: Nothing in this Act or any amendment made by this Act shall be construed to modify or affect any Federal or State law prohibiting discrimination on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, age, or disability.

children.heading: State and local laws
children.label: b State and local laws
children.text: Nothing in this Act or any amendment made by this Act shall be construed to supersede any provision of any State or local law that provides greater family or medical leave rights than the rights established under this Act or any amendment made by this Act.
